title: Unit, Property, Replay, Headless SDL, Render, and Playtest Evidence
description: Tests assert implementation details, use real time and global random state, compare one screenshot, never inject failures, and call dummy video proof of usability. Learners cumulatively produce risk-layered automated and human game test suite through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Test vector, wrap, time, input, state, score, collision, spawn, and migration invariants with fixed fixtures.
Generate bounded cases for wrap, collision symmetry, conservation, reconciliation, replay, and invalid input and retain smallest failures.
Use dummy video and audio drivers for adapter integration while labeling missing window, GPU, timing, device, and sensory evidence.
